repo.name: request-log-analyzer
repo.description: A command line tool that analyzes request logfiles (e.g. Rails, Merb, Apache) to produce a performance report.

repo.name: frozen_record
repo.description: Read only ActiveRecord-like interface to query static YAML files

repo.name: grit
repo.description: **Grit is no longer maintained. Check out libgit2/rugged.** Grit gives you object oriented read/write access to Git repositories via Ruby.

repo.description: Campfire notifier for the Integrity continuous integration server

repo.name: geoip
repo.description: The Ruby gem for querying Maxmind.com's GeoIP database, which returns the geographic location of a server given its IP address

repo.name: babel_icious
repo.description: A simple mapping framework to map hashes and xml
